2026-05-08GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityConvention establishing an International Claims Commission for Ukraine ** Agreement ** Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Convention establishing an International Claims Commission for Ukraine.N/A
subject: Convention establishing an International Claims Commission for Ukraine ** Agreement **
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Convention establishing an International Claims Commission for Ukraine.
